metadata.source: Meridian artifacts (MRL, Control List, CSC-01, CSP SOC 2 report)

walkthroughTest.procedure: Inspected the configurations within CSP backend infrastructure to determine whether the Engineering team had restricted access to the production workspace of each user entity by whitelisting their IP(s).

attributes.text: User Entity had a IP range whitelisted for them

walkthroughTest.steps:
Step 1: HA obtained the IP whitelisting configurations within CSP backend infrastructure from Declan Vasari (Software Engineer).
Step 2: HA reviewed the IP whitelisting configurations to determine whether the attributes were met.

oeTest.reason: Point-in-time control; OE testing not applicable.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within CSP backend infrastructure to determine whether the Engineering team had restricted access to the production workspace of each user entity by whitelisting their IP(s).

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team performed a review of the administrative access to AWS, Okta, MongoDB, Datadog, PagerDuty, DevRev, and GitHub and whether the CISO provided sign off.
tests.procedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team performed a review of the administrative access to AWS, Okta, MongoDB, Datadog, PagerDuty, DevRev, and GitHub and whether the CISO provided sign off.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration within Okta to determine whether access to AWS was restricted through Okta SSO using Microsoft Entra ID as the iDP.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configuration within Okta to determine whether access to AWS was restricted through Okta SSO using Microsoft Entra ID as the iDP.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations to determine whether privileged access to AWS resources hosting CSP infrastructure was restricted and governed through AWS IAM Policies.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations to determine whether privileged access to AWS resources hosting CSP infrastructure was restricted and governed through AWS IAM Policies.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether full backup of AWS RDS was scheduled everyday and was retained for 21 days. / Additionally, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether full backup of AWS Aurora was scheduled every week and was retained for 21 days.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether full backup of AWS RDS was scheduled everyday and was retained for 21 days. / Additionally, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether full backup of AWS Aurora was scheduled every week and was retained for 21 days.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether replication to other regions of backup copies of AWS Aurora was enabled.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether replication to other regions of backup copies of AWS Aurora was enabled.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS resources were utilized across multiple availability zones.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS resources were utilized across multiple availability zones.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps Team performed backup restoration and recovery tests of backed up CSP databases and whether the CISO provided sign-off.
tests.procedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps Team performed backup restoration and recovery tests of backed up CSP databases and whether the CISO provided sign-off.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the DR drill report for CSP product to determine whether a disaster recovery simulation / tabletop exercise was conducted and whether the drill documented controls and test results for infrastructure availability, system and data availability, uninterrupted process flow and training of personnel to handle disaster. / Additionally, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign-off.
tests.procedure: Inspected the DR drill report for CSP product to determine whether a disaster recovery simulation / tabletop exercise was conducted and whether the drill documented controls and test results for infrastructure availability, system and data availability, uninterrupted process flow and training of personnel to handle disaster. / Additionally, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign-off.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether data within AWS was automatically purged based on expiry of lifecycle rules.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether data within AWS was automatically purged based on expiry of lifecycle rules.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the data flow diagram to determine whether the flow of data between internal components and external entities, including data sources, transmission paths, and system boundaries were tracked.
tests.procedure: Inspected the data flow diagram to determine whether the flow of data between internal components and external entities, including data sources, transmission paths, and system boundaries were tracked.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS Shield was enabled between CSP and the internet to monitor, filter, and block HTTPS traffic as well as any potential attacks on its web application.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS Shield was enabled between CSP and the internet to monitor, filter, and block HTTPS traffic as well as any potential attacks on its web application.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS NAT Gateway was configured to manage and mask internal IPs, and to securely route outbound traffic from internal systems to external networks.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS NAT Gateway was configured to manage and mask internal IPs, and to securely route outbound traffic from internal systems to external networks.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS Security Groups was configured to restrict access to AWS Console and the services within the AWS cloud environment by whitelisting authorized IPs.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether AWS Security Groups was configured to restrict access to AWS Console and the services within the AWS cloud environment by whitelisting authorized IPs.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the AWS Security ruleset review Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team performed a review of AWS Security Groups ruleset and whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign off.
tests.procedure: Inspected the AWS Security ruleset review Jira ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team performed a review of AWS Security Groups ruleset and whether the Senior Director of Information Security and Compliance team provided sign off.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether customer managed keys (CMK) were enabled to encrypt data-at-rest within AWS EC2 instances. / Additionally, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether the customer managed keys (CMK) were configured to be automatically rotated every 365 days. / Further, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether default encryption provided by AWS was enabled to encrypt data-at-rest within AWS Aurora and RDS.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether customer managed keys (CMK) were enabled to encrypt data-at-rest within AWS EC2 instances. / Additionally, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether the customer managed keys (CMK) were configured to be automatically rotated every 365 days. / Further, inspected the configurations within AWS administrative console to determine whether default encryption provided by AWS was enabled to encrypt data-at-rest within AWS Aurora and RDS.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected CSP product certificate to determine whether CSP was configured to transmit application data over the internet using Hypertext Transfer Protocol Secure (HTTPS) over TLS v1.2 or v1.3.
tests.procedure: Inspected CSP product certificate to determine whether CSP was configured to transmit application data over the internet using Hypertext Transfer Protocol Secure (HTTPS) over TLS v1.2 or v1.3.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether alerts generated by AWS CloudTrail was configured to be re-directed to Datadog. / Additionally, inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether alerts that cross pre-defined thresholds were configured to be sent as messages to Slack. / Further, for a sample of JIRA tickets related to logging and monitoring of AWS Infrastructure, inspected the ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether alerts generated by AWS CloudTrail was configured to be re-directed to Datadog. / Additionally, inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether alerts that cross pre-defined thresholds were configured to be sent as messages to Slack. / Further, for a sample of JIRA tickets related to logging and monitoring of AWS Infrastructure, inspected the ticket to determine whether the CloudOps team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration settings within Luigi to determine whether alerts generated by CSP platform was configured to be re-directed to Datadog. / Additionally, inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether it was configured to automatically send a Slack message and raise PagerDuty incidents when thresholds were exceeded. / Further, for a sample of PagerDuty incidents related to logging and monitoring of CSP product, inspected the ticket to determine whether the CSP Engineering team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configuration settings within Luigi to determine whether alerts generated by CSP platform was configured to be re-directed to Datadog. / Additionally, inspected the configuration settings within Datadog to determine whether it was configured to automatically send a Slack message and raise PagerDuty incidents when thresholds were exceeded. / Further, for a sample of PagerDuty incidents related to logging and monitoring of CSP product, inspected the ticket to determine whether the CSP Engineering team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Karpenter terraform configurations defined for CSP to determine whether Karpenter was utilized to maintain CSP application availability and optimize cluster efficiency by dynamically autoscaling AWS Kubernetes pods and EC2 instances based on workload demands.
tests.procedure: Inspected the Karpenter terraform configurations defined for CSP to determine whether Karpenter was utilized to maintain CSP application availability and optimize cluster efficiency by dynamically autoscaling AWS Kubernetes pods and EC2 instances based on workload demands.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the status webpage for CSP to determine whether application response and availability metrics across all cloud service providers and geographical instances were reported to the user entities.
tests.procedure: Inspected the status webpage for CSP to determine whether application response and availability metrics across all cloud service providers and geographical instances were reported to the user entities.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the support website for CSP to determine whether resources such as product documentation, best practices, training materials, guides, troubleshooting tips, and community forums were documented.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the customer support workflow to determine whether the reporting and resolution of problems or incidents related to the Customer Signal Platform (CSP) were tracked.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of CSP incidents raised by user entities, inspected the DevRev ticket to determine whether resolution was provided by the Customer Support team prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration settings within Luigi to determine whether alerts generated by CSP platform was configured to be re-directed to Datadog. / Additionally, for a sample of DevRev tickets related to data ingestion, data duplication, data processing, and / or data export errors, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Customer Support team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configuration settings within Luigi to determine whether alerts generated by CSP platform was configured to be re-directed to Datadog. / Additionally, for a sample of DevRev tickets related to data ingestion, data duplication, data processing, and / or data export errors, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Customer Support team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of DevRev tickets related to data ingestion, inspected the ticket to determine whether a row level reconciliation process was executed before and after data ingestion to ensure the completeness and accuracy of the ingested data.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the Appointment Letter and Non Disclosure Agreement (NDA) acknowledgement to determine whether the users had signed and agreed to preserve ethical values and the confidentiality and integrity of information within Meridian.

tests.testProcedure: Performed inquiry with Senior HR Operations Specialist to determine whether formalized employee handbook was published on U-Central and accessible by all users. / Additionally, inspected the employee handbook to determine whether it communicated expected workforce conduct, organizational policies, and associated enforcement procedures.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the background verification reports to determine whether background check was performed before the date of hire for parameters such as International Criminal Searches, International Global Watchlist, International Education Verification, and International Employment Verification.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Global Code of Ethics and Business Conduct and Information Security and Compliance training material to determine whether it contained elements of information security policies, security threats overview, email security, password security, and incident management reporting mechanisms during breaches. / Additionally, for a sample of new hires, inspected the training completion records within Mindtickle to determine whether the new hires were made aware of code of conduct and information security and compliance during induction.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the refresher Information Security and Compliance training material to determine whether it contained elements of information security policies, security threats overview, email security, password security, and incident management reporting mechanisms during breaches. / Additionally, for a sample of active users, inspected the training completion records within Mindtickle to determine whether the active users completed the refresher trainings.

tests.testProcedure: Inquired the Information Security Senior Manager to determine whether the Job Descriptions were updated within Workday and reflect the current job responsibilities. / Additionally, for a sample of Job Descriptions, inspected the job description to determine whether roles and responsibilities were defined.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Risk Management Procedure to determine whether guidelines for the identification, preparation, and categorization of risks to satisfy business information, legal and regulatory requirements were defined and documented. / Additionally, inspected Meridian SharePoint to determine whether the Risk Management Procedure was published on Meridian SharePoint and was reviewed and approved by CISO on annual basis.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Risk Register and corresponding Jira ticket to determine whether the Information Security & Compliance team identified, reviewed, and documented the risks associated with its various functions in context of CIS Critical Security Controls, information security, data integrity, confidentiality, and availability.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Management Review Meeting invites, agenda, and minutes to determine whether the Executive Management, Steering Committee (SSC), CISO, Legal team, Privacy team, and the Information Security & Compliance teams met annually to ensure security initiatives were in line with company objectives and discussed nonconformities and findings identified during information security internal audits / risk assessments / other assessments, incidents, and their respective corrective actions.

tests.testProcedure: Performed inquiry with Meridian CISO to determine whether Board of Directors constituted of members independent of Meridian daily operations. / Additionally, inspected the ‘List of Directors’ and Board of Directors structure of Meridian to determine whether the Board of Directors demonstrated independence from Meridian's daily operations.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration within Workday HRMS and Microsoft Entra to determine whether an account within Microsoft Entra was automatically created when a user ID was created within Workday HRMS tool. / Additionally, for a sample of new joiners, inspected the automated Workday emails and access creation logs within Microsoft Entra to determine whether the Microsoft Entra ID accounts were created.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration within Workday HRMS and Microsoft Entra to determine whether an account within Microsoft Entra was automatically deactivated when a user ID was deactivated within Workday HRMS tool. / Additionally, for a sample of leavers, inspected the email sent by IT team to determine whether the user's access was revoked on or before their last working date.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configuration within Workday HRMS and Microsoft Entra to determine whether an account within Microsoft Entra was automatically deactivated when a user ID was deactivated within Workday HRMS tool. / Additionally, for a sample of leavers, inspected the email sent by IT team to determine whether the user's access was revoked on or before their last working date.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the Information Security & Compliance team performed a review of the administrative access to firewall and Okta and whether the CISO provided sign off.
tests.procedure: For a sample of quarters, inspected the Jira ticket to determine whether the Information Security & Compliance team performed a review of the administrative access to firewall and Okta and whether the CISO provided sign off.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the group policy settings configured on Meridian Microsoft Entra to determine whether password settings included configurations to enforce password length as 12 characters, password complexity, password history as 24 passwords remembered, and password expiry as 90 days, account lockout after 5 invalid logon attempts, and account lockout was reset after 30 minutes through group policy settings.
tests.procedure: Inspected the group policy settings configured on Meridian Microsoft Entra to determine whether password settings included configurations to enforce password length as 12 characters, password complexity, password history as 24 passwords remembered, and password expiry as 90 days, account lockout after 5 invalid logon attempts, and account lockout was reset after 30 minutes through group policy settings.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the Certificate of Destruction to determine whether documentation, workstations, and media devices were sanitized prior to disposal or decommissioning in accordance with the Asset Management Procedure.
tests.procedure: Inspected the Certificate of Destruction to determine whether documentation, workstations, and media devices were sanitized prior to disposal or decommissioning in accordance with the Asset Management Procedure.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the management approved network diagrams of Bengaluru, Palo Alto, and Nottingham delivery centers to determine whether firewall was implemented on the delivery center's internet gateway. / Additionally, inspected the configurations within the firewalls to determine whether rules were configured and enforced to: / ► ‘deny all’ traffic by default with access enabled for specific services as per business requirements, / ► protect against Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) and IP spoofing attacks, and / ► configure Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) and web filters to monitor and prevent intrusion attempts.
tests.procedure: Inspected the management approved network diagrams of Bengaluru, Palo Alto, and Nottingham delivery centers to determine whether firewall was implemented on the delivery center's internet gateway. / Additionally, inspected the configurations within the firewalls to determine whether rules were configured and enforced to: / ► ‘deny all’ traffic by default with access enabled for specific services as per business requirements, / ► protect against Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) and IP spoofing attacks, and / ► configure Intrusion Prevention System (IPS) and web filters to monitor and prevent intrusion attempts.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of on-premises infrastructure change tickets raised on Freshdesk tool, inspected the ticket to determine whether description of change and actions taken to implement the change were documented within the ticket.
tests.procedure: For a sample of on-premises infrastructure change tickets raised on Freshdesk tool, inspected the ticket to determine whether description of change and actions taken to implement the change were documented within the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of endpoint Windows and MacBooks laptops, inspected the Automox / Kandji patch management tool to determine whether the latest patches were applied on the MacBooks and Windows laptops in accordance with the Vulnerability and Patch Management Procedure.
tests.procedure: For a sample of endpoint Windows and MacBooks laptops, inspected the Automox / Kandji patch management tool to determine whether the latest patches were applied on the MacBooks and Windows laptops in accordance with the Vulnerability and Patch Management Procedure.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the URLs of the development, staging, and production environments to determine whether these instances were logically segregated separate VPCs within the Meridian AWS environment.
tests.procedure: Inspected the URLs of the development, staging, and production environments to determine whether these instances were logically segregated separate VPCs within the Meridian AWS environment.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of commits on the GitHub master branch, inspected the corresponding Jira tickets to determine whether authorized feature development / patch release / hotfix requirements were communicated to the CSP developers by the Project Manager using work items within a Jira ticket.
tests.procedure: For a sample of commits on the GitHub master branch, inspected the corresponding Jira tickets to determine whether authorized feature development / patch release / hotfix requirements were communicated to the CSP developers by the Project Manager using work items within a Jira ticket.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of commits on the GitHub master branch, inspected the signoff within GitHub to determine whether a peer (an employee other than the developer of the code) had conducted a code review to ensure completeness and accuracy of the code prior to initiating security testing.
tests.procedure: For a sample of commits on the GitHub master branch, inspected the signoff within GitHub to determine whether a peer (an employee other than the developer of the code) had conducted a code review to ensure completeness and accuracy of the code prior to initiating security testing.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of commits, inspected the status of all-checks-pass.yml job [or] Snyk static code analysis job within GitHub to determine whether all security checks had passed prior to deployment of code onto production.
tests.procedure: For a sample of commits, inspected the status of all-checks-pass.yml job [or] Snyk static code analysis job within GitHub to determine whether all security checks had passed prior to deployment of code onto production.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations on GitHub to determine whether all commits were required to be submitted via a pull request before they could be merged with the master branch.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations on GitHub to determine whether all commits were required to be submitted via a pull request before they could be merged with the master branch.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of commits, inspected the GitHub actions page to determine whether the code was deployed onto production post completion of all testing.
tests.procedure: For a sample of commits, inspected the GitHub actions page to determine whether the code was deployed onto production post completion of all testing.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the annual vulnerability assessment and penetration test reports for CSP to determine whether application level, network level, and API vulnerability and penetration tests for CSP were conducted, and corrective and preventive actions were tracked to closure for identified vulnerabilities.
tests.procedure: Inspected the annual vulnerability assessment and penetration test reports for CSP to determine whether application level, network level, and API vulnerability and penetration tests for CSP were conducted, and corrective and preventive actions were tracked to closure for identified vulnerabilities.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the group policy configuration on Microsoft MDM to determine whether removable media devices such as Compact Disk (CD) readers-writers and Universal Serial Bus (USB) are disabled on end-user workstations.
tests.procedure: Inspected the group policy configuration on Microsoft MDM to determine whether removable media devices such as Compact Disk (CD) readers-writers and Universal Serial Bus (USB) are disabled on end-user workstations.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the CrowdStrike Falcon EDR software configurations to determine whether the EDR software was configured to perform real-time scans to protect against malware and intrusion attempts; and whether agent tamper protection was enabled.
tests.procedure: Inspected the CrowdStrike Falcon EDR software configurations to determine whether the EDR software was configured to perform real-time scans to protect against malware and intrusion attempts; and whether agent tamper protection was enabled.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configurations within Microsoft O365 Defender to determine whether Defender was configured to perform cloud‑based protection of Meridian O365 email to detect and block phishing, malicious links, malware, and attachments.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configurations within Microsoft O365 Defender to determine whether Defender was configured to perform cloud‑based protection of Meridian O365 email to detect and block phishing, malicious links, malware, and attachments.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration settings within ProACT to determine whether alerts generated by AWS CloudTrail was configured to be re-directed to ProACT. / Additionally for a sample of Freshdesk tickets related to logging and monitoring of AWS Infrastructure, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Security Operations team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configuration settings within ProACT to determine whether alerts generated by AWS CloudTrail was configured to be re-directed to ProACT. / Additionally for a sample of Freshdesk tickets related to logging and monitoring of AWS Infrastructure, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Security Operations team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the configuration settings within ProACT to determine whether alerts generated by CrowdStrike, Microsoft MDM, and firewalls were configured to be re-directed to ProACT. / Additionally for a sample of Freshdesk tickets related to logging and monitoring of CrowdStrike, Microsoft MDM, and firewalls, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Security Operations team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.
tests.procedure: Inspected the configuration settings within ProACT to determine whether alerts generated by CrowdStrike, Microsoft MDM, and firewalls were configured to be re-directed to ProACT. / Additionally for a sample of Freshdesk tickets related to logging and monitoring of CrowdStrike, Microsoft MDM, and firewalls, inspected the ticket to determine whether the Security Operations team analyzed and took necessary corrective actions prior to closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of security incidents / breaches, inspected the Freshdesk ticket to determine whether the Security Operations team performed analysis of the incident / breach and documented the details of analysis, security violation, root cause, user / group responsible, severity of the incident / breach, and prevention and mitigation steps within the Freshdesk ticket before closing the ticket.
tests.procedure: For a sample of security incidents / breaches, inspected the Freshdesk ticket to determine whether the Security Operations team performed analysis of the incident / breach and documented the details of analysis, security violation, root cause, user / group responsible, severity of the incident / breach, and prevention and mitigation steps within the Freshdesk ticket before closing the ticket.

tests.testProcedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Meridian Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian Delivery Centers to determine whether security guards were stationed at the main entry and exit points of Delivery Centers.
tests.procedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Meridian Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian Delivery Centers to determine whether security guards were stationed at the main entry and exit points of Delivery Centers.

tests.testProcedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Meridian Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian Delivery Centers to determine whether CCTV surveillance equipment was installed at the entry and exit points, work areas, and server rooms. / Additionally, through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Meridian Workspace Experience team, inspected the CCTV monitoring room to determine whether the CCTV recordings were monitored by the Meridian Workspace Experience team.
tests.procedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Meridian Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian Delivery Centers to determine whether CCTV surveillance equipment was installed at the entry and exit points, work areas, and server rooms. / Additionally, through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Meridian Workspace Experience team, inspected the CCTV monitoring room to determine whether the CCTV recordings were monitored by the Meridian Workspace Experience team.

tests.testProcedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Meridian Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian Delivery Centers to determine whether card-based access control system was installed to restrict access to entry and exit points to the delivery center.
tests.procedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Meridian Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian Delivery Centers to determine whether card-based access control system was installed to restrict access to entry and exit points to the delivery center.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the email from Workspace Experience team to determine whether physical access was provided to the user after receiving the automated email from Workday HRMS tool.
tests.procedure: For a sample of new hires, inspected the email from Workspace Experience team to determine whether physical access was provided to the user after receiving the automated email from Workday HRMS tool.

tests.testProcedure: For a sample of resigned / terminated / absconding users, inspected the email from HR Team to determine whether resignation / termination / absconding user was notified by HR Team to Workspace Experience team for deactivation of physical access to the Meridian Delivery Center. / Additionally, for a sample of resigned / terminated / absconding users, inspected the email from Workspace Experience team to determine whether the physical access for resigned / terminated / absconding user was deactivated within one day of the intimation.
tests.procedure: For a sample of resigned / terminated / absconding users, inspected the email from HR Team to determine whether resignation / termination / absconding user was notified by HR Team to Workspace Experience team for deactivation of physical access to the Meridian Delivery Center. / Additionally, for a sample of resigned / terminated / absconding users, inspected the email from Workspace Experience team to determine whether the physical access for resigned / terminated / absconding user was deactivated within one day of the intimation.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the annual physical access user reconciliation email communication between Workspace Experience team and the Information Security & Compliance team to determine whether a reconciliation of the personnel with access to the Meridian Delivery Centers and the list of active users was performed.
tests.procedure: Inspected the annual physical access user reconciliation email communication between Workspace Experience team and the Information Security & Compliance team to determine whether a reconciliation of the personnel with access to the Meridian Delivery Centers and the list of active users was performed.

tests.testProcedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian delivery centers to determine whether fire extinguishers and smoke detectors were installed.
tests.procedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian delivery centers to determine whether fire extinguishers and smoke detectors were installed.

tests.testProcedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian delivery centers to determine whether uninterruptible power supply (UPS) systems and diesel generators (DG) were installed.
tests.procedure: Through the use of video streaming technology assisted by Workspace Experience team, inspected the Meridian delivery centers to determine whether uninterruptible power supply (UPS) systems and diesel generators (DG) were installed.

tests.testProcedure: Inspected the preventive maintenance reports to determine whether preventive maintenance of fire detection, prevention, and suppression equipment, UPS and DG sets were conducted as per preventive maintenance contracts.
tests.procedure: Inspected the preventive maintenance reports to determine whether preventive maintenance of fire detection, prevention, and suppression equipment, UPS and DG sets were conducted as per preventive maintenance contracts.
